title: Offset Management and Persistence Flow
interaction_flow: OffsetReader → KafkaConnect(offsetStorageReader): read stored offset map by partition key
MySqlOffsetContext.Loader → BinlogOffsetContext: new MySqlOffsetContext(snapshot, snapshotCompleted, TransactionContext.load(offset), IncrementalSnapshotContext.load(offset), new SourceInfo)
BaseSourceTask → ChangeEventSourceCoordinator: start with recovered BinlogOffsetContext
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: [if NOT inTransaction] restartBinlogPosition = pos + size; restartRowsToSkip=0; restartEventsToSkip=0
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: [if not last row] restartRowsToSkip = eventRowNumber+1; else restartRowsToSkip = total
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: offsetUsingPosition(restartRowsToSkip) → Map{server_id, gtids, file, pos, event, row, ts_sec}
BinlogOffsetContext → TransactionContext: store(offset) [adds tx metadata if not snapshot]
BinlogOffsetContext → IncrementalSnapshotContext: store(offset) [adds incremental snapshot state]
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: restartGtidSet = currentGtidSet; currentGtidSet = trimmedGtidSet
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: restartBinlogFilename = sourceInfo.binlogFilename(); restartBinlogPosition = sourceInfo.binlogPosition(); inTransaction=true; setTransactionId()
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogOffsetContext: completeEvent() [after each event in tx]
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: restartGtidSet=currentGtidSet; restartBinlogPosition=pos+eventSize; restartRowsToSkip=0; restartEventsToSkip=0; inTransaction=false
=== PERIODIC FLUSH TO KAFKA CONNECT OFFSET STORAGE ===
KafkaConnect → BaseSourceTask: commitRecord(SourceRecord, RecordMetadata) [called after record ack]
BaseSourceTask → ChangeEventSourceCoordinator: commitOffset(partition, lastOffset) [for each partition in lastOffsets map]
ChangeEventSourceCoordinator → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: commitOffset(partition, offset) [if not locked and streamingSource non-null]
key_relationships: BaseSourceTask uses ChangeEventSourceCoordinator to forward commitOffset

steps: 1. Extract binlogFilename (required, throws ConnectException if missing)
6. Call setInitialSkips(eventsToSkip, rowsToSkip) — allows mid-transaction resume

important_notes: restartBinlogFilename/restartBinlogPosition always point to the SAFE restart position, not current position
When inTransaction=true, setEventPosition does NOT advance restartBinlogPosition (only committed transactions are safe restart points)
restartEventsToSkip+restartRowsToSkip enable mid-transaction recovery by skipping already-processed events/rows
GTID mode: restartGtidSet trails currentGtidSet until commitTransaction()
BinlogPartition.getSourcePartition() returns Map{server → serverName}, used as the Kafka Connect partition key
commitRecord() is called by Kafka Connect framework after Kafka producer ack, not after binlog read
performCommit() is called inside poll() (not in a separate thread) to serialize with task lifecycle
BinlogTaskContext is minimal: just wires rawConfig + BinlogConnectorConfig to CdcSourceTaskContext
